'''VernanGroup''', or '''The Vernan Group''', was a successful industrial business in the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. The business also owned a large portion of the [[Minos-Mestra Corporation]]. Unfortunately, with the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], businesses came under closer scrutiny and the Minos-Mestra Co. suffered. With waning profits, VernanGroup was forced to sell their stock in the company to local investors.
